<!-- Thanks for contributing to Nimbus! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the change and the motivation. -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Notable changes should reference a prior issue/discussion. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / tests / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes (and `test/integration` if behavior changed)
- [ ] `gofmt` and `golangci-lint run` are clean
- [ ] New behavior has unit tests; new backends/transports have an integration test
- [ ] Hot-path changes include or update a benchmark
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the docs and `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, see CONTRIBUTING.md)
